issue_statement: Scaffold and ownership semantics are still needed upstream, but they should not widen the first preview/open or Delivery projection rollout.
expected_outcome: SCE exposes one canonical scaffold result and one ownership relation extension point without blocking phase-1 IDE projection work.
impact_scope: engineering scaffold behavior, workspace relation semantics, later IDE/CLI onboarding enhancement
reproduction_steps: Observe that scaffold and ownership are mixed with preview/open semantics
Observe that this makes rollout order and implementation scope unstable
forbidden_workarounds: Do not make frontend store long-lived ownership truth to compensate
Do not let scaffold semantics block the first preview/open or Delivery projection rollout
